methods.name: read_build_ele_from_pyp
methods.signature: read_build_ele_from_pyp( file_name: str, ) -> tuple[bool, ModuleType | None, BuildingElement | None]
methods.summary: Create BuildingElement and python module based on .pyp file This method gets only the BuildingElement and the python module of the script, the .pyp file refers to. The resulting BuildingElement contains parameters with their default values. Use this method in the script of a main element (e.g. PythonPartGroup) to get the BuildingElement of the subordinate elements (e.g. PythonParts in the group).
methods.remarks: Create BuildingElement and python module based on .pyp file This method gets only the BuildingElement and the python module of the script, the .pyp file refers to. The resulting BuildingElement contains parameters with their default values. Use this method in the script of a main element (e.g. PythonPartGroup) to get the BuildingElement of the subordinate elements (e.g. PythonParts in the group).

returns.doc: True, if import was successful, False otherwise
